title: Korbond Single Point Knitting Needle Pair 4.00mm x 35cm – Aluminium – Ideal for A Multitude of Patterns and Projects - Jumpers, Socks, Blankets – Beginner to Expert - Smooth Knit
features: With over 60 years of trading, Korbond is the UK’s No. 1 trusted brand of sewing, crafting & clothes care tools and accessories
High Quality Aluminium Knitting Needles in a full range of sizes, making it an ideal set for all yarn weights and project types. Appropriately weighted for both strength and comfort in use
Pack contains: 1 x 4.00mm Aluminium Knitting Needles
Ideal for beginner to expert knitters, the 4mm needle is one of the most common and popular sizes to knit all DK patterns
The Aluminium Needle is one of the most popular choices, offering strength and little flexibility
description: From the manufacturer Available now Korbond Care & Repair Plastic Knitting Needles 35cm Length Knitting Needle Range The Korbond knitting needle range provides a suitable selection of needles and accessories for beginners and experts alike. The 35cm long knitting needles offer the freedom to create a lightweight or chunky garment depending upon seasons and fashions. ALL PROJECTS All the 35cm knitting needles offer the freedom to create a lightweight or chunky garment depending upon seasons and fashions. FULL RANGE Korbond offers premium knitting needles in a full range of sizes and materials, making it an ideal set for all yarn weights and project types. Appropriately weighted for both strength and comfort in use BEGINNER TO EXPERT Ideal for beginner to expert knitters, suitable for adults learning to knit, or experienced knitters creating complex pieces. BAMBOO, PLASTIC OR ALUMINIUM Choose the best material for your project or knitting style. Bamboo needles are light and easy to handle, Aluminium needles offer an extremely smooth surface meaning the yarn slips freely along the needle, enabling speed and plastic offers a middle ground between the two.
